hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json,os,subprocess,datetime; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','') or (d.get('tool_response') or {}).get('filePath',''); ts=datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S'); bn=os.path.basename(f); subprocess.run('cd C:/Users/mjungpk/Desktop/Imprint && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m \"auto: '+ts+' '+bn+'\" && git push origin main', shell=True) if f and 'Imprint' in f else None" 2>/dev/null || true
